title: BIAT urgent transfer lure
description: Email claims urgent internal transfer and asks for password verification.
content_text: Alerte BIAT: urgent transfer en attente, verify password now.
label: phishing

title: Credential reset spoof in Arabic
description: Arabic SMS-style bait requesting immediate credential reset.
content_text: تم رصد نشاط مشبوه، قم بإعادة تعيين كلمة المرور الآن عبر الرابط.
label: phishing

title: Benign telecom maintenance notice
description: Legitimate maintenance communication from telecom operator.
content_text: Tunisie Telecom annonce une maintenance planifiée sans demande d'identifiants.
label: benign
